failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch output and produced an answer inconsistent with the returned evidence, stating 9 options and a nonexistent record instead of the 2 returned matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked which available bagged Vacuum Cleaner items cost more than $591.59. The tool returned 2 matching items with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762, priced 655.59 and 622.12. At step 4, the Executor had the relevant tool output but synthesized an answer claiming there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000, which contradicts the tool result and invents unsupported information. This failure was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer despite noting the mismatch.
